title: An odd Comparison
wikitext:
[]: An odd Comparison             Quote Post by DarkNova » Wed Jul 18, 2007 1:35 pm I recently re-watched the Anime Series .Hack//SIGN (Which I highly recommend) for the first time since I saw Eva. Now maybe Iâ€™ve just got Eva on the brines, but there really seemed to be many similarities, in particular the 4 main Characters in both seemed very similar. So what do you think, could I be on to something. P.S this is my first Topic so plz dont kill me

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jul 18, 2007 2:39 pm I'll throw you a bone, Tsubasa is basically a androygenous Rei clone.

[]:             Quote Post by DarkNova » Wed Jul 18, 2007 3:42 pm Actually I saw much more similarities between Tsukasa and Shinji. There both people who solve there problem by running away, there both depressed and have Zero confidence in them selves. And itâ€™s Rei and Subaru that I connected and not just because of there looks, as there both quiet girls who fall in love with the main character and are a major factor in getting said character out of depression. => They're ; they're ; their ; they're EDIT: sorry, not my strong point.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Jul 18, 2007 4:39 pm *Off-topic* Hey SEELE 08, where ya been?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jul 18, 2007 8:41 pm I tend to come and go...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 18, 2007 8:47 pm ...Unfortunately I haven't seen that anime so I can't say. I'm sure other people have.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jul 18, 2007 8:52 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Fortunately I haven't seen that anime so I can't say.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Jul 18, 2007 9:55 pm I used to like it. I haven't seen it in a while though, so I'm not sure if I would still like it. Legend of the Twilight Bracelet sucked though.

[]:             Quote Post by DarkNova » Wed Jul 18, 2007 10:06 pm @ BrikHaus: in this world we are all entitled to an opinion, however I would be much obliged if youâ€™d keep yours to yourself.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Jul 18, 2007 10:10 pm DarkNova wrote: @ BrikHaus: in this world we are all entitled to an opinion, however I would be much obliged if youâ€™d keep yours to yourself.

[]: Re: An odd Comparison             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jul 18, 2007 10:59 pm DarkNova wrote: I recently re-watched the Anime Series .Hack//SIGN ... . Now maybe Iâ€™ve just got Eva on the brines, but there really seemed to be many similarities, in particular the 4 main Characters in both seemed very similar. So what do you think, could I be on to something.

[]: Re: An odd Comparison             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jul 18, 2007 11:12 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: A main character who is a bit disconnected from the world around him, a bossy redhead, a soft-spoken blue haired girl, a lot of enigmatic talking, and an anti-climactic ending. A lot of these things are basic archetypes, and I don't there's any intentional parallel.

[]: Re: An odd Comparison             Quote Post by DarkNova » Thu Jul 19, 2007 6:49 pm NAveryW wrote: And what anime caused those archetypes to become heavily used in future series? 8)
